bead.title: Update homepage with software-factory sub-claim and concept-page link
bead.description: Update website/content/_index.md (and/or website/layouts/index.html as applicable) to add the sub-claim 'A document-driven software factory.' under the existing hero. Link to /docs/concepts/software-factory/.
bead.acceptance: 1. Homepage hero gains 'A document-driven software factory.' sub-claim. 2. Sub-claim is a link to /docs/concepts/software-factory/. 3. cd website && hugo builds without errors. 4. 'rg -n "document-driven software factory" website/content/_index.md website/layouts/index.html' returns >= 1 match.
